full_text: Shanaka to Vikramjit Singh, Caught by Kamindu Mendis!! The catch is taken on the second attempt with a lot of good fortune. Banged in short, Vikramjit goes for the pull and miscues it off the top-edge as it climbs on him. Kamindu runs to his left from deep midwicket and gets to it but it sneaks through his hands. However, luckily, it falls right on the knees and pops up again, giving him a second chance and he latches onto it.
